# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent linkerd no mtls.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: linkerd
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: secure-server
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service
  port:
    number: 8080
    protocol: TCP
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1.1
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: secure-authz
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  server:
    name: secure-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      identities:
        - "my-service.linkerd.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: secure-policy
  namespace: linkerd
spec:
  targetRef:
    kind: Server
    name: secure-server
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            kind: ServiceAccount
            name: my-service
            namespace: linkerd
  action: Allow
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: linkerd-identity-issuer
  namespace: linkerd
type: kubernetes.io/tls
data:
  tls.crt: <base64-encoded-cert>
  tls.key: <base64-encoded-key>
